important.subject: Google Cloud Platform & APIs: Update your tax info
important.snippet: Google Cloud Platform & APIs Update your tax information To make sure that the correct taxes are applied to the Google services that you use, please update your tax information for Harshad Chandak as soon as possible. You may be unable to claim tax exemptions or view tax information on your invoices until this information is updated.
